home.title: Manage your finances simply and smartly
home.subtitle: Take control of your financial future with powerful tools for expense tracking, bill management, and financial planning. Everything you need in one secure, intuitive platform.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your finances
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed to make financial management effortless

expenseTracking.title: Expense Tracking
expenseTracking.description: Monitor your spending across categories and identify areas for improvement with detailed analytics.

billManagement.title: Bill Management
billManagement.description: Never miss a payment again with automated reminders and due date tracking for all your bills.

financialInsights.title: Financial Insights
financialInsights.description: Get personalized insights and recommendations to optimize your financial health and savings.

secureData.title: Bank-Level Security
secureData.description: Your financial data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption and security protocols.

benefits.title: Join thousands of users taking control of their finances

upcomingBills.title: Upcoming Bills
upcomingBills.empty: You're all caught up on payments!

recentExpenses.title: Recent Expenses
recentExpenses.subtitle: Top Spending Categories
recentExpenses.empty: You haven't added any expenses to this period yet!

signIn.title: Sign in to your account
signIn.demoAccount: For testing purposes, you can use the following credentials to log in:

bills.title: Bills
bills.subtitle: Manage your bills and never miss a payment again. Stay on top of your bills and avoid late fees with our easy-to-use bill management system.
bills.emptyDescription: You haven't added any bills. Start tracking your expenses by adding one now!

add.title: Add New Bill
add.description: Add a new bill to your transactions. Click to add when you're done.

edit.title: Edit Bill
edit.description: Edit your bill information. Click to confirm when you're done.

details.title: Bill Details
details.description: Here you can view detailed information about the selected bill, including its status, due date, and any associated receipts.

delete.title: Delete Bill
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this bill? All of its data will be permanently removed and this action cannot be undone.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track your expenses and stay within your budget. Keep an eye on your spending habits and make informed decisions about your money.
expenses.emptyDescription: You haven't added any expenses. Start tracking your expenses by adding one now!

add.title: Add New Expense
add.description: Add a new expense to your transactions. Click to add when you're done.

edit.title: Edit Expense
edit.description: Update the selected expense and save your changes when you're done.

details.title: Add New Expense
details.description: Add a new expense to your transactions. Click to add when you're done.

delete.title: Delete Expense
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this expense? All of its data will be permanently removed and this action cannot be undone.

details.title: Expense Details
details.subtitle: Review the expense details and manage attachments.
details.uploadDescription: Upload multiple files to attach to this expense.
details.notFoundDescription: We could not find this expense in your current organization.

more.title: More
more.subtitle: Access settings, account tools, and upcoming features.

bills.title: Bills
bills.description: Manage recurring bills and due dates.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Manage members, invites, and workspace settings.

createOrganization.title: Create Organization
createOrganization.description: Set up a new organization workspace.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Plan monthly budgets and spending limits.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: This is how others will see you on the site.
account.updateSuccessDescription: You have successfully updated your account information.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Manage your workspace settings, members, and invitation links.

unavailable.title: Organization not found
unavailable.description: We could not load the selected organization details.

empty.title: No organization selected
empty.description: Create an organization first to manage members, invitations, and workspace settings.

create.title: Create the organization that will hold your team, bills, and expenses.
create.description: Start with a clean workspace for a company, client, side project, or household. You can invite members and adjust settings right after creation.
create.formDescription: Pick a clear name so your workspace is easy to recognize when switching between organizations.
create.nameDescription: You can rename this later from the organization settings page.

benefits.workspace: Keep data separated by workspace from day one.
benefits.invites: Invite teammates with roles as soon as the workspace is ready.
benefits.settings: Update members, invites, and naming later from organization settings.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Basic metadata for the selected organization.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update the organization name used across the workspace.
settings.nameDescription: This name is shown in the organization switcher and account screens.
settings.successDescription: The organization name has been updated successfully.

members.title: Members
members.description: Review current members and prepare role management workflows.
members.empty: No members were returned for this organization.
members.manageRolesDescription: You can assign roles when creating invites today. Editing roles for existing members still depends on backend support for member roles and role updates.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Generate a join link for a new organization member and choose the role they should receive.
invite.emailDescription: We will generate a join link that this person can use after signing in.
invite.successDescription: Share the join link or raw token with the invited member.
invite.shareDescription: Use the join link for a smoother onboarding flow, or send the raw token if you need a manual fallback.
invite.linkDescription: Best option for most members. It preserves the invitation token automatically.
invite.tokenDescription: Useful when you need to paste the invitation into another system or message manually.
invite.securityNote: Invitation tokens are time-limited. If the member cannot use this invite before it expires, generate a new one from the organization page.

benefits.linkDescription: Members can sign in and continue straight into the organization without re-entering the token.
benefits.roleDescription: Pick the right role now so the member lands in the workspace with the correct permissions.

roleDescriptions.owner: Full control of the organization, including billing and destructive settings.
roleDescriptions.admin: Can manage members and workspace settings, without owner-level billing control.
roleDescriptions.member: Can work inside the organization using the permissions allowed by the plan.

join.title: Join organization
join.subtitle: We are validating your invitation and preparing your workspace.
join.redirectingDescription: You need to sign in before joining this organization.
join.joiningDescription: Please wait while we add you to the organization and switch your workspace.
join.successDescription: Your workspace has been updated. Redirecting to the dashboard...
join.successNote: The newly joined organization is now selected automatically so you can start working immediately.
join.errorHelp: This can happen if the token is invalid, expired, or was already used. You can ask the organization owner for a fresh invite if needed.
join.missingToken: This invitation link is missing a token.
join.genericError: We could not complete this invitation. Please try again.
join.pendingNote: Keep this page open while we finish the authentication and workspace handoff steps.

benefits.authenticate: We confirm your identity before accepting the invitation.
benefits.access: Once accepted, your account is added to the organization workspace.
benefits.switch: We automatically switch you into the new organization when the join succeeds.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner in financial management
